body:
Hi Armaan,

Thanks for applying to the SWE Intern role at Stripe! I'd love to set up a 30-minute intro call. Do any of these times work for you?

- Thu 4/24 at 10:00 AM PT
- Fri 4/25 at 2:00 PM PT
- Mon 4/28 at 11:30 AM PT

Let me know and I'll send over a calendar invite with the Zoom link.

Best,
Priya
subject: Intro call — Stripe SWE Intern
